name: Colleen Maguire
subject: The 10th of 10
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

You may have heard that my sister, Katie McGinty, grew up the 9th of 10 children in northern Philadelphia. My name is Colleen Maguire, and I'm the 10th of those 10 children.

Even though we were closest in age, like so many young siblings, Katie and I enjoyed the challenge of a good sibling rivalry. Space was a valuable commodity in our small 3 bedroom home. With so many siblings and other relatives living with us on Summerdale Avenue, Katie and I were always paired up. I would set very elaborate traps to catch her invading my stuff! She could never figure out how I knew she'd been into my things.

Our spats were always a protection of our space and never a tarnish on our bond. We shared with each other our deepest secrets and our greatest fears, our biggest dreams and our most fervent hopes.

That's why I'm so proud that Katie is running for U.S. Senate. At every stage of her life, Katie has sought out opportunities to give back to her community. She has always had a passion for public service and a heartfelt desire to bring about positive change. Her campaign for Senate is exactly about that - finding ways to support Pennsylvanians and helping families get ahead.

For the next few days at least though, Katie will be taking a break from the campaign trail to spend time with our families. We feel very blessed to have the opportunity to share meals, exchange gifts, and celebrate this holiday season together.

Thank you for being a part of this campaign. From our whole family to yours, we wish you a very happy holiday season and a joyous new year.

Colleen Maguire
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-264163058757140480/5254032806002032640?refcode=e20151224&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-264163058757140480/5181975211964104704).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Ben & Candy Carson
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
|
---

_"...an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, 'Joseph son of David, do not be afraid to take Mary home as your wife, because what is conceived in her is from the Holy Spirit. She will give birth to a son, and you are to give him the name Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins.'" \--Matthew 1:20-21_
* * *

Peter,

We have had a very blessed year, and in no small part do we owe that to you.

From our family to yours, we wish you a Merry Christmas.

May God's blessing surround you, your family and your loved ones on this special day.
Sincerely,

Ben & Candy Carson

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Petition (via boldpac.com)
subject: Tell GOP: STOP keeping Dems from the polls!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| **TELL REPUBLICANS:[Stop restricting voting rights >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

As we head into Election Year, Republicans are doing everything they can to prevent Democrats from getting out to the polls.

Unreasonable voter ID regulations, moving polling locations out of minority communities, and restricting early voting are just some of the ways they are trying to secure wins in 2016.

**[Add your name to tell Republicans they can't strip citizens of their First Amendment right to vote: ](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | ****[SIGN YOUR NAME>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")****
---
Friends --

When Democrats get out to the polls, we win -- _that 's a fact_.

In 2008, President Obama's historic campaign inspired RECORD voter turnout,[1] drawing more people to the polls than America had seen in **40 years**. _Republicans were scared_.

And that's why Republicans are trying to keep minorities, the elderly, and young people from making it to the polling booth this November.

**SIGN YOUR NAME:[Tell Republicans to STOP restricting voting rights >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

Since 2010, 22 states have passed strict new voting restrictions.[2]

Such restrictions, like shorter voting hours and tougher voter ID laws, deterred primarily the poor, elderly, and minority communities from voting.

These laws are poised to have a serious impact on the 2016 Presidential Election if we don't act NOW.

**[We can't afford to let Republicans suppress the people's right to vote. Sign your name to demand Republicans STOP restricting voting rights:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea77c/e60883a/702c4a11/14420836/3761265354/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Protect-The-Vote?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Thank you for taking action,

_BOLD PAC_
* * *
[1] CBS News | December 15, 2008 | 2008 Election Turnout Hit 40-Year High.
[2] Brennan Center for Justice | July 7, 2015 | States With New Voting Restrictions Since the 2010 Election.
